name: Masterworks 4: Miguel Espinoza Fusion
description: ★ Rating: 6/10 🎭 Artistic Merit – Miguel Espinoza Fusion ensemble delivered competent accounts of Copland's El Salón México and Holst's The Planets, with brass fanfares in Copland's opening mariachi bursts ringing clear and Holst's "Mars" pounding with steady…
